eldritch_loadout.title: Equip a full ISS Eldritch school spellcasting loadout for the End dimension — focus + spell book + mana ring

eldritch_cast.title: Cast 10 Eldritch school spells in the End dimension — exploit the void-entity damage bonus

subtitle.text: The Eldritch school was made for this dimension. The void entities resist everything else. They do not resist this.

description: CH.13 · ELDRITCH IN THE VOID
▸ Iron's Spellbooks has 9 magic schools.
The Eldritch school is the End school.
It receives a damage bonus against void-type entities
— which includes every mob in the End dimension.
The Cataclysm End bosses (Harbinger, Primordial) are void-type.
Build the Eldritch loadout before fighting them.
◈ ELDRITCH SCHOOL SPELLS
└ Eldritch spells draw from void energy mechanics
└ Key spells for End combat:
Void Tendril — pulls enemies toward you (Shulker control)
Wither Skull — debuff on contact (wither effect stack)
Eldritch Blast — ranged void damage (Enderman-effective)
└ School synergy: Eldritch + Blood magic for sustain
(Blood school has life-leech — useful in End regeneration gap)
└ Full school list in ISS JEI — Eldritch books in End loot
◈ ELDRITCH LOADOUT SETUP
└ Focus: ISS casting implement (held in offhand)
└ Spell Book: equip Eldritch school spells (Main/School filter)
└ Ring of Mana: increases mana pool for extended casting
└ Casting armor: prioritize mana regen pieces
(combat-heavy End has no regeneration — mana regen = sustain)
└ Ancient Tomes (Quark): upgrade Eldritch spells above vanilla cap
(from Immersive Enchanting Ancient Tome interaction)
◈ END ENTITY VOID BONUS
└ Void damage bonus applies to: Endermen, Shulkers,
Endermites, Phantoms, all Cataclysm End bosses
└ Ender Dragon: partial bonus (boss-type modifier stacks)
└ The Trigon (Ender Trigon mod): full void bonus applies
└ True End mobs: void-type, full bonus
▸ The first spellcasters who reached the End
did not bring Eldritch magic.
They brought fire and lightning.
The void absorbed it.
The ones who came back
came back speaking in a different school.
They had learned it from the dimension itself.
The Eldritch school is that lesson, codified.
▶ Equip a full Eldritch school ISS loadout [check]
▶ Cast 10 Eldritch spells against End entities [check]
◇ Ring of Mana is the most impactful single piece
for sustained Eldritch casting in the End.
Without it, you run dry mid-fight.
Craft or find one before the Cataclysm End chain.
